blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It looks like it'll be a quiet day today. But we still shouldn't let our guard down.
Shirone responded with a smile.
She wasn't doing this simply to dig up high-level information.
He was grateful for Reina's efforts to reassure her.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm sorry about earlier today. I must have been on edge.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Hoho, it's okay. Don't worry too much. I'll do my best to protect you. By the way, relax a bit. If you stay so tense, you might trip.
As Shirone relaxed his body, the two moved with graceful and fluid dance steps, like flowing water.
They were the most beautiful couple in the ballroom.

blocks.speaker: Noble Lady
blocks.content: Haha! What a perfect match they make. How can Shirone-nim be so beautiful? It must be thanks to inheriting His Majesty's bloodline.

blocks.speaker: Noble Lady
blocks.content: And what about his partner? I hear she's a famous musician from the Kingdom of Thormia. She has such a lovely presence; just seeing her brightens your mood.
Amy was standing alongside the noble ladies having this conversation.
Even to her eyes, they were clearly different from other couples.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Why is it taking so long?
Checking the time, Amy realized it was going much longer than initially planned.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She wondered if some new information had come up, but at that moment, someone approached.
Startled, Amy noticed it was Zion, and she quickly gave a respectful bow.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Good evening, Your Highness.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Yes, are you enjoying the banquet?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Yes. Everything is to my liking.
Zion smiled with satisfaction.
Having spent the evening dealing with Sirone, who treated him with little respect, the contrast of Amy's flustered attitude made him finally feel like a prince.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: How about it? May I request you as a partner for a moment?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Yes, it would be an honor.
Amy took Zion's hand and entered the ballroom.
Although it was her first time with the traditional Kazra dance, with her exceptional dancing skills and Red Eyes abilities, she could match Zion's rhythm without much difficulty.
The gazes of the nobles now shifted to Zion and Amy.
They were met with a flood of admiration, rivaling that of Shirone and Reina.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Lovely. Beautiful. Noble. And so on.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy's face flushed hot. Is this what it feels like to become a princess?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But the excitement quickly faded.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She had never once wanted to become a princess. Every day, her thoughts were solely focused on becoming the greatest mage in the world.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Surprisingly innocent. That's unexpected?

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: You're beautiful.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Is this kid out of his mind? She wanted to scream out of embarrassment.
But she couldn't show given the setting she was in.
As she continued dancing while boiling with emotion inside, her gaze collided head-on with Shirone approaching from the opposite side.
It was truly a fleeting moment.
Shirone seemed surprised.
Even in that brief instant, his eyes conveyed a question.
Amy quickly averted her gaze.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She didn't know why, but she was afraid to meet Shirone's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She regretted it afterward, realizing she shouldn't have done that, but by then, the distance between them had grown.
As her mind became complicated and her steps began to tangle, Zion smiled.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Be comfortable. As long as you're with me, no one can look down on you.
Zion liked Amy.
She felt different from the spoiled nobles.
Finding her adorable, he pulled her closer by the waist, causing Amy to stop dancing abruptly.
It was the result of her body reacting before she could think.
Naturally, the nobles' attention was focused on them.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy, her face flushed, scrambled to come up with a way out.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Oh, I'm a little tired. It was fun.
Acting as if she had intended to stop from the beginning, she politely excused herself and turned away.
But a flash of malice glinted in Zion's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: I've taken custody of Vincent and Olena.
Amy quickly scanned the crowd with shocked eyes.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She was trying to find Shirone's location.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: It's not good to cause a scene. Don't tell anyone and quietly follow me. If you do, Sirone's parents will be released safely.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy turned her gaze back and forced a calm expression.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The biggest issue was that she couldn't determine whether he was telling the truth.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Reina's attendants were supposed to check in every hour, and the last report came in 32 minutes ago.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Would something have happened in those 32 minutes? Or was that enough time for something to have happened?
Amy followed Zion, acting as if nothing had happened.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Whatever intention he had in plotting this, she knew she wasn't the core of it.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: In any case, in 28 minutes, Reina would act. If she could hold out until then, the crisis might turn into an opportunity.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Of course, I have to survive first.
As the two held hands and left, the nobles finally dispelled their doubts.
It wasn't an uncommon sight for young men and women to slip out of the hall when passions flared.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: The strategy of using Shirone's parents was Plan B proposed by Arius.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: He had boasted that he could make any woman fall for him, so his pride was more than a little hurt.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Fine. Anyway, it's enough if I just pull her out. I've done my part, Arius.
Once Amy was out of the picture, Sirone would be isolated.
Reina would have to manage the overall affairs of the royal palace, so she wouldn't be able to focus solely on Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Even if she did eventually realize what was happening and acted, by then, Shirone's head would already be rolling on the ground.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Kekekeke, farewell, Shirone.
Reina looked at Sirone, who suddenly stopped dancing, with a puzzled expression.
It seemed like she didn't even realize that her legs had stopped moving.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Shirone, what's wrong? What happened?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh, that's... Amy went somewhere with Zion.
Reina quickly scanned the room.
Just as Sirone had said, the two of them were nowhere to be seen.
According to her investigation, Zion wasn't the type to pursue women.
However, he doesn't hate women like most boys his age, so there were quite a few women who spent the night with him.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Thinking simply, he might have taken an interest in Amy.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Amy was a girl beautiful enough to charm even royalty, and with Zion's personality, he wouldn't hesitate even if she was Shirone's friend.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: The problem was Amy. What on earth did she hear to follow Zion?
